title: A Grace.
content:
Lord, we thank and thee adore,
            For temp'ral gifts we little merit;
        At present we will ask no more,
            Let William Hyslop give the spirit.
meaning:
"A Grace." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
